item.title: 欧洲央行加息可能比预期的更近——卡齐米尔称
item.description: 欧洲央行理事会成员彼得·卡齐米尔表示，伊朗战争及其对通胀的影响可能迫使欧洲央行提前加息。【原文：The Iran war and its impact on inflation risk forcing the European Central Bank to raise interest rates sooner than anticipated, according to Governing Council member Peter Kazimir.】

item.title: 莱茵金属2026年展望未达预期
item.description: 德国国防巨头莱茵金属公司公布2026年销售额展望为140亿至145亿欧元（合163亿至169亿美元），这一数字低于分析师预期，正值该公司面临关键时期——欧洲各国军事支出计划正逐步成形。【原文：German defense prime Rheinmetall AG posted a 2026 sales outlook of €14 billion to €14.5 billion ($16.3 billion to $16.9 billion), falling short of analyst expectations at a critical time for the company, as Europe’s military spending plans take shape.】

item.title: 阿达尼能源从阿波罗获得5亿美元双边债务融资
item.description: 据知情人士透露，阿达尼集团旗下某子公司通过私募债券向阿波罗全球管理公司旗下基金募集约5亿美元资金，此举凸显了这家印度综合企业持续寻求美元债券市场之外融资渠道的努力。【原文：A unit of Adani Group raised about $500 million through a bond privately placed with funds managed by Apollo Global Management Inc., according to people familiar with the matter, highlighting the Indian conglomerate’s ongoing effort to tap funding outside the public dollar bond market.】

item.title: 英镑上涨，因油价压力缓解
中东危机之际 韩国将加速重启核电
item.description: 韩国将加快重启正在维护中的核反应堆，以确保在中东持续战争期间的能源供应。【原文：South Korea will speed up the restart of nuclear reactors undergoing maintenance to secure energy amid the ongoing war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 太平洋投资管理公司将私募信贷"清算"归咎于草率承销
item.description: 太平洋投资管理公司表示，私人信贷市场日益加剧的压力源于多年来放贷过程中疏于审查的承保标准。【原文：The rising strain in the private credit market is a result of years of sloppy underwriting standards in lending, according to Pacific Investment Management Co.】

item.title: 泰国石油基金每日耗资3200万美元以限制柴油价格
item.description: 泰国政府正扩大抑制燃油需求的举措，因其在全球能源成本飙升之际，为维持国内柴油价格人为低位而耗费大量资金。【原文：The Thai government is widening efforts to curb demand for fuel, as it bleeds cash fighting to keep domestic diesel prices artificially low amid surging global energy costs.】

item.title: 摩根大通下调私募信贷组合估值，《金融时报》报道
item.description: 据《金融时报》报道，摩根大通公司正限制向私募信贷基金放贷，此前该公司对其投资组合中某些资产进行了减记。这标志着信贷市场中曾经蓬勃发展的领域正面临压力。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. is restricting its lending to private credit funds after marking down the value of certain assets in their portfolios, the Financial Times reported, the latest sign of stress in a once-booming segment of the credit market.】

item.title: 伊朗战争战术从过去冲突的教训中不断演变
item.description:
从无人机集群攻击到导弹发射装置的打击，塑造这场冲突的战略体现了2025年美国、以色列和伊朗积累的实战经验。【原文：

From drone barrages to strikes on missile launchers, the strategies shaping the conflict reflect experience gained by the US, Israel and Iran in 2025.

】

item.title: 中国人民银行采用浮动人民币汇率定价机制应对伊朗战争影响
item.description: 中国央行正释放出对人民币汇率灵活性容忍度提高的信号，这表明其有信心使人民币免受伊朗战争引发的市场动荡影响。【原文：China’s central bank is signaling an increased tolerance for yuan flexibility, a sign of confidence it can insulate the currency from market turmoil triggered by the Iran war.】

item.title: 全球银行反对印度离岸外汇报告计划
item.description: 据知情人士透露，全球贷款机构反对印度央行要求加强离岸卢比交易报告的提案。【原文：Global lenders pushed back against a proposal by India’s central bank for more reporting of offshore rupee trades, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 卡塔尔液化天然气出口中断持续时间创至少2008年以来最长纪录
item.description: 卡塔尔全球最大的液化天然气出口工厂已连续五天未出口任何货物——这是自2008年有记录以来最长的停运期——可能进一步推高该燃料的价格。【原文：The world’s biggest liquefied natural gas export plant in Qatar hasn’t exported a shipment for five days — the longest streak in data going back to 2008 — threatening to further boost prices for the fuel.】

item.title: 伊朗不能让特朗普既得鲱鱼又抽身而退
item.description:
市场押注战争将早日结束，但双方都需要宣告胜利。

【原文：

Markets are betting on an early end to the war, but both sides need to declare victory.

】

item.title: 伊朗战争推高日本关键铝价至2015年以来最高水平
item.description: 由于中东战争导致全球最常用材料之一的供应紧张，日本买家目前获得的铝材溢价已达11年来最高水平。【原文：Aluminum is being offered to Japanese buyers at the highest premium in 11 years, as war in the Middle East constricts supply of one of the world’s most widely used materials.】

item.title: 中国采取措施限制银行和政府机构使用OpenClaw人工智能
item.description: 中国当局已采取行动，限制国有企业和政府机构在办公电脑上运行OpenClaw人工智能应用程序。随着中国各地企业和消费者开始尝试这种智能代理型人工智能技术，政府迅速采取措施化解潜在安全风险。【原文：Chinese authorities moved to restrict state-run enterprises and government agencies from running OpenClaw AI apps on office computers, acting swiftly to defuse potential security risks after companies and consumers across China began experimenting with the agentic AI phenomenon.】

item.title: 日本五年期国债拍卖需求强劲，央行政策路径不明朗
item.description: 日本五年期政府债券拍卖需求强劲，投资者正权衡日本央行加息路径，而伊朗战争带来的不确定性仍在持续。【原文：Japan’s five-year government bond auction drew solid demand as investors mull the Bank of Japan’s rate-hike path amid ongoing uncertainties surrounding the Iran war.】

item.title: 曾任学术顾问者引领OpenAI万亿美元级人工智能建设
item.description: 数月来，OpenAI的萨姆·阿尔特曼一直高调宣称计划斥资数万亿美元，进行前所未有的数据中心建设，这些数据中心将配备先进芯片以驱动人工智能。【原文：For months, OpenAI’s Sam Altman has been talking up plans to spend trillions of dollars on an unprecedented buildout of data centers stocked with advanced chips to power AI.】

item.title: 油价冲击全球市场之际，中国意外成为避风港
item.description: 随着伊朗战争导致油价飙升，全球最大原油进口国——中国——的市场表现却意外坚挺。【原文：As the war in Iran sent oil prices soaring, one market holding up unexpectedly well is that of the world’s largest crude importer: China.】

item.title: 普拉博沃免费餐计划遭民间团体提起诉讼
item.description: 印度尼西亚总统普拉博沃·苏比安托的旗舰免费餐计划正面临来自民间团体的第二次宪法挑战，这些团体质疑这项耗资200亿美元计划的资金安排。【原文：Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto’s flagship free meals is facing a second constitutional challenge from civil groups who are questioning the funding arrangements for the $20 billion initiative.】

item.title: 工人们准备在嘉能可澳大利亚铜冶炼厂罢工
item.description: 嘉能可公司澳大利亚铜冶炼厂的工人威胁从周五开始罢工，此前双方在薪酬争议中未能达成协议。【原文：Workers at Glencore Plc’s Australian copper refinery have threatened to strike from Friday, after failing to reach an agreement in a pay dispute.】

item.title: 铝价波动，伊朗战争持续扰乱贸易流动
item.description: 铝价小幅走高，交易员正评估伊朗战争可能持续扰乱全球工业金属供应链的时间长度。【原文：Aluminum edged higher as traders assessed how long the Iran war might continue to disrupt global flows of the industrial metal.】

item.title: 黄金吸引力减弱或将推动投资者转向印度低估值股票
item.description: MSCI印度指数估值已降至2023年末以来最低水平。【原文：MSCI India gauge is at its cheapest valuation since late 2023.】

item.title: 澳大利亚两大顶级银行预测澳联储将于三月加息
item.description: 澳大利亚两大"四大银行"的经济学家预计，随着持续强劲的通胀压力持续发酵，澳大利亚储备银行将于下周连续第二次加息。【原文：Economists at two of Australia’s “Big Four” lenders expect the Reserve Bank to deliver a second consecutive interest-rate increase next week as it grapples with persistently strong inflation.】

item.title: 澳大利亚意外成为收益率避风港，能源价格居高不下
item.description: 澳元意外成为避风港，得益于油气价格高企以及市场日益押注央行可能最早在下周加息。【原文：Australia’s dollar has emerged as an unlikely haven, buoyed by elevated oil and gas prices and growing bets that the central bank may raise interest rates as early as next week.】

item.title: 中国能源安全战略初见成效，亚洲炼油业因战乱动荡
item.description: 中国庞大的原油储备为其炼油企业提供了喘息空间，尽管中东战事正冲击着原油生产与运输——这是多年来持续储备和多元化供应的回报。【原文：China’s vast reserves of crude oil are giving its refiners breathing space as war in the Middle East roils production and shipping — a payoff from years of stockpiling and diversifying supply.】

item.title: 越南动用燃料基金稳定油价 应对供应短缺风险
item.description: 随着中东冲突加剧了全球能源供应的担忧，越南采取措施缓冲消费者因燃料成本急剧上涨带来的冲击。【原文：Vietnam moved to cushion consumers from a sharp jump in fuel costs as the Middle East conflict stoked growing concerns over global energy supplies.】

item.title: 战神计划在亚洲设立首个本地货币私募信贷基金
item.description: 据知情人士透露，随着泰国成为该资产类别的新兴市场，Ares Management Corp.计划在泰国设立其首个亚洲本地货币私募信贷基金。【原文：Ares Management Corp. is planning to establish its first Asia local currency private credit fund in Thailand, according to people familiar with the matter, as the country emerges as a new market for the asset class.】

item.title: 韩国考虑追加预算以应对中东局势影响
item.description: 韩国财政部长具允哲表示，韩国将视情况采取一切必要政策措施，包括可能追加预算，以缓冲中东局势升级对经济造成的冲击。【原文：South Korea will implement all available policy measures as needed, including a possible supplementary budget, to cushion the economy from the impact of escalating tensions in the Middle East, according to Finance Minister Koo Yun Cheol.】

item.title: 任天堂股价大涨10%，新作《宝可梦》提振市场情绪
item.description: 任天堂公司股价飙升逾10%，创下自4月以来最大涨幅，其新款宝可梦游戏的意外成功抵消了市场对内存芯片成本上涨的担忧。【原文：Nintendo Co. shares soared as much as 10% in their steepest climb since April as the surprise success of its new Pokémon game helped offset worries around the rising cost of memory chips.】

item.title: 海莱昂首席执行官瞄准中国、印度市场增长，推进新工厂建设与并购计划
item.description: 海乐恩公司正斥资6500万英镑（约合8720万美元）在上海新建口腔健康工厂，这家消费健康巨头正加倍押注中国和印度等市场以推动增长。【原文：Haleon PLC is making a 65 million pound ($87.2 million) investment in a new oral health plant in Shanghai, as the consumer health giant doubles down on markets like China and India to drive growth.】
